u02.title: This is my sister.
u02.subtitle: 介绍家庭成员 · 指示代词指人 · 名词复数
u02.grammar: 指示代词 this/that/these/those · Who 问句
can_do: I can introduce my family members using “This is...” and “These are...”
I can ask “Who is she?” and answer with family words.
I can use this / that / these / those to talk about people.
I can write a short paragraph about my family photo.
u02.scene: Mary 给朋友 Linda 看自己的家庭照片。
dialogue: Hi, Linda! Come and look at my family photo!
This is my mother. And this is my father.
Those are my grandparents, and these are my brothers, Tom and Bob.
No, it isn't. She is my cousin, Jenny.
She's beautiful! You have a big family!
translation: Mary: 嗨 Linda！过来看我的全家福！
Linda: 哇！这位是谁？
Mary: 这是我妈妈。这是我爸爸。
Linda: 他们是谁？
Mary: 那些是我的（外）祖父母，这些是我的兄弟 Tom 和 Bob。
Linda: 这是你的姐姐吗？
Mary: 不，不是。她是我的表姐 Jenny。
Linda: 她很漂亮！你有一个大家庭！
key_points: Who's this? / Who are they?
用 Who 询问“谁”。单数用 is，复数用 are。
This is my mother.
介绍他人用 This is...（单数）或 These are...（复数）。
Those are my grandparents.
those 指远处的人，these 指近处的人。
She is my cousin.
指代女性用 she，男性用 he。
reading_paras: Hello! I'm Mary. This is a photo of my family.
These are my parents. My mother is a teacher. My father is a doctor.
Those are my grandparents. They are very kind.
These two boys are my brothers. Their names are Tom and Bob.
And this little girl is me! I love my family.
vocab: My mother cooks dinner every day.
My father reads newspapers after dinner.
My grandfather walks in the park every morning.
我爷爷每天早上在公园散步。
父/母（单数）；父母（复数 parents）
Who is she? She is my aunt.
patterns: This is / That is + 人物.
用来介绍或指认一个人。this 指近处，that 指远处。

✅ This is my mother.
✅ That is my sister.
➡ 复数：These are my parents. / Those are my grandparents.
Who's this / that? & Who are they?
询问照片中的人是谁。单数用 is，复数用 are。

✅ Who's this? — It's my cousin.
✅ Who's that? — That's my uncle.
✅ Who are they? — They are my friends.
Is this / that your + 人物?
确认某人是否是对方的某位家人。

✅ Is this your sister? — Yes, she is.
✅ Is that your brother? — No, he isn't. He's my friend.
✅ Are those your grandparents? — Yes, they are.
He / She is + 描述.
用 he/she 指代男性/女性，并描述其身份或特征。

✅ She is a teacher.
✅ He is my uncle.
✅ They are very kind.
grammar_tables: 1⃣ 指示代词指人：this / that / these / those

📌 对比：
This is my mother.（近处介绍）
That is my aunt.（远处指认）
📌 Who 问句的 be 动词根据回答的人称/数来变化——单数用 is，复数用 are。
辅音+y → 变 y 为 i 加 -es

💡 对比：
This is my brother.（一个兄弟）
These are my brothers.（两个以上兄弟）
exercises: 介绍一个人用单数指示代词 This。
brothers 是复数，谓语用 are，指示代词用复数 These。

— ____ is she?
— She is my ____ (姑姑).
问女性身份用 Who is she? “姑姑”英文是 aunt。
连词成句：this / your / is / sister / ?
一般疑问句以 be 动词开头。

补全对话：
A: Look at the photo! ____ is that girl?
B: Oh, ____ is my cousin, Lily.
第一空问“那个女孩是谁”用 Who；第二空回答用 she 或 that。
两个错误：1) These 是复数 be 动词用 are；2) 照片中父母两人用 parents。

根据上下文补全短文：
Hi! I ____ Tom. Here is a photo ____ my family.
____ are my parents. This is my ____ (妹妹). She is 7. I love my ____.
I am…a photo of…复数指代…sister…my family
u02.micro_task: 写一段话，描述一张你的家庭照片。介绍照片中的每个人（至少3人），用上 This is / These are 和 Who 问句。
model_paras: Here is a photo of my family.
These are my parents. My mother is a nurse. My father is a driver.
This little boy is my brother. He is 8 years old.
Who is that old woman? She is my grandmother. She is very nice.
u02.model_trans: 这是一张我的全家福。这两位是我的父母。我妈妈是护士，爸爸是司机。这个小男孩是我的弟弟，他8岁了。那位老妇人是谁？她是我的祖母，她非常和蕦。
checklist: 我能用 This is... / These are... 介绍家人
我能用 Who 问句询问“谁”并回答
我能区分 this/that/these/those 在指人时的用法
我能使用 he/she/they 正确指代不同性别和数量的人
我能写一段话介绍家庭合影
u02.feynman: 指着家庭照片中的每个人，用英语逐一介绍——“This is my mother. She is a teacher. That is my grandfather. He is very kind.”
review: 🔵 1天后：默写家庭成员的英文单词
🟢 3天后：口头介绍一张家庭照片
🟡 1周后：写一段关于你家庭的短文
🔴 1月后：复习 Who 问句和指示代词表格
u02.next_desc: 下一单元你将学习用 Where 问物品的位置，使用介词 in / on / under 描述方位——这些对话中也会用到家庭房间的场景！

u05.title: Do you have a soccer ball?
u05.subtitle: 谈论物品所属 · 一般现在时 have/has · 运动词汇
u05.grammar: Do/Does 一般疑问句 · have/has 用法 · Let's 祈使句
u05.writing: 描述自己和朋友的体育用品
can_do: I can ask “Do you have...?” and answer about sports equipment.
I can use “Let's play...” to make suggestions.
I can use “That sounds...” to give opinions.
I can write about what sports things I have.
u05.scene: Frank 和 Mike 在讨论各自有什么球类用品，商量一起运动。
dialogue: Mike, do you have a soccer ball?
No, I don't. But I have a basketball.
That sounds good. Do you have a basketball?
Yes, I do. I have a basketball and a baseball, too.
Wow! Do you have a baseball bat?
No, I don't. Let's ask John. He has one.
translation: Frank: Mike，你有一个足球吗？
Mike: 不，我没有。但我有一个篮球。
Frank: 太好了！我们去打篮球吧！
Mike: 听起来不错。你有一个篮球吗？
Frank: 是的，我有。我有一个篮球，还有一个棒球。
Mike: 哇！你有棒球棒吗？
Frank: 不，我没有。我们去问约翰吧。他有一个。
Mike: 好的！走吧！
key_points: Do you have a soccer ball?
一般疑问句用 Do 开头 + 主语 + have + 物品。回答Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
I don't have one.
don't = do not，否定形式。第三人称单数用 doesn't have。
Let's play basketball!
Let's = Let us，后面跟动词原形。用来提出建议。
That sounds good.
That sounds + 形容词。表达对建议的看法。
reading_paras: Hi! I'm Frank. I like sports very much.
I have a basketball and a baseball. I play basketball with my friends after school.
My friend Mike doesn't have a soccer ball, but he has a volleyball.
We often play volleyball on weekends. It is fun!
Do you have a favorite sport? Let's play together!
vocab: The ball is under the chair.
Baseball is popular in the US.
patterns: Do you have + 物品?
询问对方是否有某物。

✅ Do you have a soccer ball?
➡ Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
✅ Does he have a basketball?
➡ Yes, he does. / No, he doesn't.
Let's + 动词原形 + 其他.
提出建议。

✅ Let's play basketball!
✅ Let's go to the park!
✅ Let's ask John!
That sounds + 形容词.
表达对建议的看法。

✅ That sounds good.
✅ That sounds interesting.
✅ That sounds boring.
主语 + have / has + 物品.
陈述拥有某物。第三人称单数用 has。

✅ I have a basketball.
✅ She has a volleyball.
✅ He doesn't have a soccer ball.
grammar_tables: 📌 注意：第三人称单数用 has，否定和疑问用 doesn't/Does + have（还原）。
📌 助记：Does 用于 he/she/it，后面动词变回原形。
He don't have a soccer ball.
He doesn't have a soccer ball.
Let's + 动词原形 + 地点
否定：Let's not + 动词原形
📌 Let's = Let us，表示建议。回答可以用 That sounds good / interesting / boring.
exercises: ____ you have a basketball? (Do / Does / Are)
you 为第二人称，用 Do 提问。

— Do you have a tennis racket?
— No, I ____. But my brother ____ one.
否定 don't；brother 第三人称单数 has。
第三人称单数否定用 doesn't + 动词原形。

补全对话：
A: ____ you have a baseball bat?
B: No, I ____. But Mike ____ one.
A: Let's ____ him!
一般疑问句 Do；否定 don't；第三人称 has；Let's + 动词原形。
汉译英：我哥哥有一个篮球。他没有足球，但他有排球。
My brother has a basketball. He doesn't have a soccer ball, but he has a volleyball.
第三人称 has 和 doesn't have。
u05.micro_task: 写一段话，介绍你和你的朋友有什么体育用品，以及你们喜欢一起做什么运动。
model_paras: I have a basketball and a tennis racket.
My friend Mike doesn't have a basketball, but he has a volleyball.
We often play volleyball together. It is fun!
Does Mike have a baseball? No, he doesn't. But I have a baseball bat.
Let's play sports every day!
u05.model_trans: 我有一个篮球和一个网球拍。我的朋友 Mike 没有篮球，但他有一个排球。我们经常一起打排球。Mike 有棒球吗？不，他没有。但我有棒球棒。让我们每天运动吧！
checklist: 我能用 Do you have...? 提问并回答
我能区分 have 和 has 的不同用法
我能用 Let's... 提出建议
我能用 That sounds... 表达看法
我能简单介绍自己和朋友的体育用品
u05.feynman: 跟同学来一场英语对话——“Do you have a soccer ball? Let's play together!”
review: 🔵 1天后：用 Do you have...? 问5个同学有什么球类
🟢 3天后：写一段自己和朋友的运动爱好
🟡 1周后：用 Let's 提出建议，与同学做英语对话练习
🔴 1月后：复习 have/has 的一般现在时表格
u05.next_desc: 下一单元你将学习用 Do you like...? 谈论喜欢的食物，区分可数和不可数名词！

u06.title: Do you like bananas?
u06.subtitle: 谈论食物喜好 · 可数/不可数名词 · like 用法
u06.grammar: like 一般现在时 · 可数/不可数名词 · some/any
u06.writing: 描述自己的一日三餐饮食
can_do: I can ask “Do you like...?” about food.
I can say what I like and don't like.
I can distinguish countable and uncountable nouns.
I can write about what I eat for three meals.
u06.scene: 午餐时间，Anna 和 Ben 在食堂讨论各自喜欢和不喜欢的食物。
dialogue: Yes, I do. I like fruit very much.
No, I don't like hamburgers. They are unhealthy.
What about salad? Do you like salad?
Yes, I like salad. It's healthy and delicious.
Let's get some salad for lunch!
Great! I like chicken salad best.
translation: Anna: Ben，你喜欢香蕉吗？
Ben: 是的，我喜欢。我非常喜欢水果。
Anna: 你喜欢汉堡包吗？
Ben: 不，我不喜欢汉堡包。它们不健康。
Anna: 沙拉呢？你喜欢沙拉吗？
Ben: 是的，我喜欢沙拉。它又健康又美味。
Anna: 我们午饭买些沙拉吧！
Ben: 太棒了！我最喜欢鸡肉沙拉。
key_points: Do you like bananas?
询问喜好。Do + 主语 + like + 食物? 回答：Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
I don't like hamburgers.
don't like = do not like，表示“不喜欢”。第三人称用 doesn't like。
I like fruit very much.
like + 食物 表示喜欢某物。可数名词复数表示一类事物，不可数名词直接用原形。
Let's get some salad.
some 用于肯定句中表示“一些”。any 用于否定和疑问句中。
reading_paras: Hello! I'm Anna. Let me tell you about my eating habits.
For breakfast, I like eggs and milk. I don't like bread for breakfast.
For lunch, I like rice, chicken and vegetables. Salad is my favorite.
For dinner, I usually have noodles or porridge. I like fruit after dinner.
I eat healthy food every day. I don't eat too much junk food.
vocab: I like tomato and egg soup.
I like all kinds of fruit.
patterns: Do you like + 食物?
询问对方是否喜欢某种食物。

✅ Do you like bananas?
✅ Does she like salad?
➡ Yes, I do. / No, she doesn't.
I like + 食物. / I don't like + 食物.
表达自己的喜好。

✅ I like fruit.
✅ I don't like hamburgers.
➡ 第三人称：He likes salad. / She doesn't like meat.
What about + 名词/动名词?
提出建议或询问对方意见。

✅ What about salad?
✅ What about playing tennis?
➡ 等于 How about...?
Let's have / get + 食物.
提议吃某种食物。

✅ Let's have some rice.
✅ Let's get some fruit.
➡ 肯定句用 some，否定/疑问用 any。
grammar_tables: 📌 第三人称单数 like → likes；否定用 doesn't like；疑问用 Does...like。
2⃣ 可数名词 vs 不可数名词
有单复数形式；可用 a/an
a banana, two bananas, an apple
没有复数形式；不用 a/an
不可数用 much / a little
📌 对比：I like bananas（可数复数表类别）. I like rice（不可数用原形）.
exercises: you 前用 Do 提问。
可数名词表类别用复数。

— Do you like milk?
— Yes, I ____. I ____ milk every morning.
肯定回答 do；每天喝 milk。
改错：He like chicken very much.
汉译英：我不喜欢面包。但我的妹妹喜欢。
I don't like bread. But my sister likes it.
don't like；sister 第三人称 likes。

补全对话：
A: ____ your brother like ice-cream?
B: Yes, he ____. But he ____ (not like) candy.
brother 第三人称 Does；肯定 does；否定 doesn't like。

用所给词填空（可数/不可数）：
I eat ____ rice for lunch. My sister eats ____ fruit every day.
rice 不可数用 much/some；fruit 不可数用 much。
u06.micro_task: 写一段话介绍你一日三餐的饮食喜好，说明喜欢和不喜欢什么。
model_paras: Hi! I'm Tom. Let me tell you about my three meals.
For breakfast, I like milk and eggs. I don't like bread.
For lunch, I like rice, chicken and vegetables. Salad is great!
For dinner, I usually have noodles. I like fruit after dinner.
I try to eat healthy food every day.
u06.model_trans: 嗨！我是 Tom。让我来介绍我的三餐。早餐我喜欢牛奶和鸡蛋。我不喜欢面包。午餐我喜欢米饭、鸡肉和蔬菜。沙拉很不错！晚餐我通常吃面条。我喜欢饭后吃水果。我尽量每天吃健康的食物。
checklist: 我能用 Do you like...? 询问对食物的喜好
我能用 like / don't like 表达个人喜好
我能区分可数名词和不可数名词
我能理解 some 和 any 的基本用法
我能写一段话介绍自己的饮食习惯
u06.feynman: 用英语说出你一日三餐吃什么——“For breakfast, I like eggs and milk...”
review: 🔵 1天后：用 Do you like...? 问家人喜欢什么食物
🟢 3天后：默写10个食品单词并标注可数/不可数
🟡 1周后：写一篇 My Eating Habits 小短文
🔴 1月后：复习 like 一般现在时表格和名词分类
u06.next_desc: 下一单元你将学习购物场景的表达——How much is/are...? 问价格，还会学到衣物的英文名称！

u07.title: How much are these socks?
u07.subtitle: 购物对话 · 询问价格 · 衣物名词 · 指示代词
u07.func: Ask about prices · Buy and sell
u07.grammar: How much 问句 · 指示代词 + 名词 · 形容词描述
can_do: I can ask “How much is/are...?” about prices.
I can use this/that/these/those with clothes.
I can use color and size adjectives.
I can write a simple store ad.
u07.scene: Linda 在一家服装店购物，店员在帮她。
dialogue: Welcome to our store! Can I help you?
Yes, please. I need a sweater for school.
Oh, it's expensive. Do you have a cheaper one?
Yes. How about this blue one? It's 45 dollars.
Great! And how much are these socks?
translation: 店员：欢迎光临！我能帮你吗？
Linda: 是的。我需要一件上学穿的毛衣。
Linda: 这件红毛衣多少钱？
店员：68美元。
Linda: 哦，太贵了。有便宜一点的吗？
店员：有。这件蓝色的怎么样？45美元。
Linda: 太好了！这些袜子多少钱？
店员：5美元三双。
Linda: 好的，我买了！
key_points: Can I help you?
购物时店员的常用语。也可以说 What can I do for you?
How much is this red sweater?
问价格用 How much is/are...? 单数用 is，复数用 are。回答 It's / They're + 价格。
How about this blue one?
How about...? 提出建议或推荐。one 代替前面提到的单数名词。
I'll take it/them.
I'll take it/them. = “我买了” 购物决定购买时的常用表达。
reading_paras: Welcome to Fashion Store! We have a big sale this weekend.
Do you need sweaters? We have red, blue and white sweaters for only 45 dollars.
How much are our T-shirts? They are 20 dollars for one and 35 dollars for two.
Socks are only 3 dollars for two pairs. Shoes are 55 dollars.
Come to our store now! You will find great things at good prices!
patterns: How much is/are + 物品?
询问价格。单数用 is，复数用 are。

✅ How much is this sweater?
➡ It's 45 dollars.
✅ How much are these socks?
➡ They're 5 dollars.
Can I help you?
店员招呼顾客的用语。

✅ Can I help you?
➡ Yes, please. I need a sweater.
➡ No, thanks. I'm just looking.
How about + 名词/代词?
提出建议或推荐。

✅ How about this blue one?
✅ How about these shoes?
➡ one 代替单数名词。
I'll take + 物品.
决定购买。

✅ I'll take it.
✅ I'll take them.
➡ 单数用 it，复数用 them。
grammar_tables: How much + is + 单数名词?
How much + are + 复数名词?
📌 How much 既可以问不可数名词的数量，也可以问价格。
2⃣ 指示代词 + 颜色/大小 + 名词
this red sweater, that blue shirt
these white socks, those black shoes

📌 对比：
this red sweater（近处）
that blue skirt（远处）
these cheap socks（复数近处）
I want to buy a shirt.
I'll take it. These sweater is nice.
I'll take it. This sweater is nice.
exercises: ____ much is this shirt? (What / How / Where)
I'll take ____ (it / them). — 指代 the sweater.
How much ____ that red skirt? — ____ 68 dollars.
skirt 单数用 is；回答 It's。

补全对话：
Clerk: ____ I help you?
You: Yes, please. I ____ a T-shirt.
Can I help you? 固定搭配；need 需要。
改错：How much is these short?

你想知道那条蓝色裙子多少钱。你问店员：
____
How much is that blue skirt?
that 指远处；问价格 How much is。
u07.micro_task: 假设你是一家服装店的老板，写一则促销广告，介绍你的商品和价格。
model_paras: Come to Happy Clothes Store! We have a big sale!
Do you need sweaters? We have nice sweaters for only 35 dollars.
How much are our T-shirts? They are 20 dollars for one.
Socks are 4 dollars for two pairs. And shorts are only 25 dollars!
Come and see for yourself! You will love the prices!
u07.model_trans: 快来快乐服装店！我们正在大促销！你需要毛衣吗？我们有漂亮的毛衣只要35美元。我们的T恤多少钱？20美元一件。袜子4美元两双。短裤只要25美元！快亲自来看看吧！
checklist: 我能用 How much is/are...? 问价格
我能用 Can I help you? / I'll take it. 进行购物对话
我能用 this/that/these/those + 颜色 + 名词描述衣物
我能理解 one 代替名词的用法
我能写一则简单的促销广告
u07.feynman: 和同学模拟购物场景——“Can I help you?” “How much is this sweater?” “I'll take it.”
review: 🔵 1天后：用 How much 问5件物品的价格并回答
🟢 3天后：模拟一次完整的购物对话
🟡 1周后：写一则英文促销广告（50词左右）
🔴 1月后：复习价格询问和衣物词汇
u07.next_desc: 下一单元你将学习用 When is...? 问日期，学会12个月份和序数词的表达！

u08.title: When is your birthday?
u08.subtitle: 询问日期 · 12个月份 · 序数词 · 日期表达
u08.grammar: When 问句 · 序数词 · 月份和日期表达 · 介词 in/on
u08.writing: 介绍学校日历中的重要事件
can_do: I can ask “When is your birthday?” and answer.
I can name all 12 months in English.
I can use ordinal numbers (1st, 2nd, 3rd...).
I can write about important dates at school.
u08.scene: Chen Jie 在跟新同学 Lisa 了解对方的生日和学校活动。
dialogue: Oh, that's Teachers' Day in China, too!
Yes! So it's easy to remember. When is your birthday?
Cool! Our school has a basketball game in January.
It's on January 20th. You can come and watch!
translation: Chen Jie: Lisa，你的生日是什么时候？
Lisa: 我的生日是9月10日。
Chen Jie: 哦，在中国那也是教师节！
Lisa: 是的！所以很好记。你的生日呢？
Chen Jie: 在1月15日。
Lisa: 酷！我们学校1月有一场篮球赛。
Chen Jie: 真的？什么时候？
Lisa: 1月20日。你可以来看！
key_points: When is your birthday?
用 When 询问日期。回答 It's on + 月份 + 日期序数词。
on September 10th
具体的某一天用介词 on。月份首字母大写。日期用序数词（10th = tenth）。
in January
只说到月份时用介词 in。月份前不加冠词。
January 15th
日期表达：月份 + 序数词。可以写 January 15 或 January 15th。
reading_paras: Welcome to our school! Let me tell you about some important days.
Our school trip is in April. It is on April 12th. We go to the zoo.
The basketball game is on May 20th. I will play in the game!
The English test is on June 15th. I need to study hard.
And the school art festival is in October. It is on October 25th.
What about you? What are the important dates in your school?
vocab: We have a holiday in August.
The art festival is in October.
patterns: When is + 事件?
询问日期。

✅ When is your birthday?
➡ It's on September 10th.
✅ When is the school trip?
➡ It's in April.
It's on + 月份 + 日期序数词.
回答具体日期。

✅ It's on May 20th.
✅ It's on January 1st.
➡ 序数词缩写：1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th...
How old + be + 主语?
询问年龄。

✅ How old are you?
✅ How old is your brother?
➡ 回答：I'm 13 years old.
Happy + 节日/事件!
祝福用语。

✅ Happy birthday!
✅ Happy New Year!
➡ 节日祝福：Happy + 节日名。
grammar_tables: 十位不变 + 个位序数
When is your birthday? It is in June 1st.
When is your birthday? It is on June 1st.
📌 助记：月份名称首字母必须大写。具体日期用 on，只说月份用 in。
exercises: My birthday is ____ May 10th. (in / on / at)
____ month of the year is March? (First / Third / Second)

补全对话：
A: When is the English test?
B: It's ____ June 15th.
A: ____ old are you?
B: I'm 13.
具体日期 on；问年龄 How old。
汉译英：1月是一年中的第一个月。
January is the first month of the year.
改错：My birthday is in January 15th.

按从小到大排序：
September 1st, August 20th, October 5th, July 15th

补全短文：
My birthday is ____ April. It is ____ April 18th. I am 13 ____ old.
只说月份用 in；具体日期用 on；years old。
u08.micro_task: 写一段话介绍你的生日和你学校三个重要活动的日期。
model_paras: Hi! I'm Zhang Wei. My birthday is on March 12th.
I am 13 years old. I like March because spring is beautiful.
Our school has some important events every year.
The school trip is on April 10th. We go to the museum.
The sports meeting is on October 15th. I like sports day!
u08.model_trans: 嗨！我是张伟。我的生日是3月12日。我13岁。我喜欢三月，因为春天很美丽。我们学校每年有一些重要活动。学校旅行在4月10日，我们去博物馆。运动会在10月15日。我喜欢运动会！
checklist: 我会用 When 问日期并正确回答
我能记住12个月份的英文名称和拼写
我会用序数词表达日期（1st, 2nd, 3rd...）
我能区分 in（月份/年）和 on（具体日期）的用法
我能写一段话介绍重要的日期
u08.feynman: 不用看笔记，按顺序说出12个月份、1-31的序数词——然后互相问生日。
review: 🔵 1天后：按顺序默写12个月份
🟢 3天后：用 When is...? 问家人的生日并写下来
🟡 1周后：写一篇 Important Dates in My School
🔴 1月后：复习序数词变化规律和日期介词
u08.next_desc: 下一单元你将学习用 What's your favorite...? 谈论喜欢的学科，用 Why...? Because... 说明理由！

u09.title: My favorite subject is science.
u09.subtitle: 谈论学科喜好 · 星期名称 · 陈述理由
u09.grammar: What/Why 特殊疑问句 · because 引导原因 · 形容词描述
u09.writing: 介绍自己最喜欢的学科和课表
can_do: I can ask “What's your favorite subject?” and answer.
I can ask “Why do you like...?” and answer with “Because...”
I can name all 7 days of the week.
I can write about my school schedule and favorite subject.
u09.scene: 课间，Li Hua 和 Tom 在聊各自最喜欢的科目以及原因。
dialogue: My favorite subject is science. I love doing experiments!
That's cool! Why do you like science?
Because it is very interesting and useful.
Mr. Wang. He is a great teacher.
What day is your science class?
It's on Monday and Friday. What subject do you like?
I like English. It's fun and I like to speak it!
translation: Li Hua: Tom，你最喜欢的科目是什么？
Tom: 我最喜欢的科目是科学。我喜欢做实验！
Li Hua: 真酷！你为什么喜欢科学？
Tom: 因为它非常有趣且有用。
Li Hua: 你的科学老师是谁？
Tom: 王老师。他是一位很棒的老师。
Li Hua: 你的科学课在星期几？
Tom: 在周一和周五。你喜欢什么科目？
Li Hua: 我喜欢英语。它很有趣，而且我喜欢说英语！
key_points: What's your favorite subject?
用 What's your favorite + 类别? 询问最喜欢的人/物。回答 My favorite... is...。
Why do you like science?
Why...? 问原因。Because... 回答。“因为……”是英语中最常用的因果表达。
Because it is interesting and useful.
Because 引导原因状语从句。后面跟完整的句子。because 和 so 不能同时使用。
What day is your science class?
问“星期几”用 What day。星期名称首字母大写，前面用 on。
reading_paras: My name is Tom. I am a middle school student.
I have many subjects at school. They are Chinese, math, English, science, history and P.E.
My favorite subject is science. Why do I like it? Because it is very interesting. I like doing experiments.
I also like P.E. It is fun and I can play sports with my friends.
But I don't like history. I think it is a little difficult. What is your favorite subject?
vocab: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。
History tells us about the past.
历史告诉我们过去的事。
I like art because it is fun.
我喜欢美术因为它好玩。
patterns: What's your favorite + 类别?
询问最喜欢的人/事物。

✅ What's your favorite subject?
➡ My favorite subject is science.
✅ What's your favorite sport?
➡ My favorite sport is basketball.
Why do you like + 事物?
询问喜欢的原因。

✅ Why do you like science?
➡ Because it is interesting.
✅ Why does he like math?
➡ Because it is useful.
What day is + 课程?
询问某节课在星期几。

✅ What day is your science class?
➡ It's on Monday and Friday.
➡ 星期名称大写，用 on。
Who is your + 教师类名词?
询问老师是谁。

✅ Who is your science teacher?
➡ Mr. Wang is my science teacher.
➡ Mr. 男士 / Ms. 女士 + 姓氏。
grammar_tables: How are you? / How much is it?
📌 特殊疑问词 + 一般疑问句语序（疑问词 + be/do/does + 主语 + 其他？）
📌 星期名称首字母大写。用 on Monday / on Friday。
Because I like science, so I study hard.
I like science, so I study hard.
What's your favorite subject? It's on Monday.
My favorite subject is science. It's on Monday.
exercises: ____ is your favorite subject? (What / When / Who)
She likes art ____ it is fun. (because / so / but)
____ do you like English? — Because it is interesting.

补全对话：
A: ____ is your music teacher?
B: ____ Li. She is very nice.
汉译英：我最喜欢的科目是历史。我觉得它很有趣。
My favorite subject is history. I think it is very interesting.

补全短文：
I go to school from ____ to Friday. My ____ subject is English. I like it ____ I can speak English. My English teacher is ____ Green. She is fun.

连句成段：
a. I think it is a little difficult but very useful.
b. My favorite subject is math.
c. Our math teacher is Mr. Chen.
d. Why do I like it?
先介绍最喜欢的科目 → 问原因 → 说明原因 → 介绍老师。
u09.micro_task: 写一段话介绍你最喜欢的学科和原因，以及这个学科在每周的哪几天上课。
model_paras: My name is Li Hua. I am a middle school student.
I have many subjects. My favorite subject is English.
Why do I like English? Because it is very useful and interesting.
I like to speak English with my friends. It makes me happy.
I have English classes on Monday, Wednesday and Friday.
My English teacher is Ms. Zhang. She is kind and helpful.
u09.model_trans: 我叫李华，是一名中学生。我有很多科目。我最喜欢的科目是英语。为什么喜欢英语？因为它非常有用且有趣。我喜欢和朋友说英语。我在周一、周三和周五有英语课。我的英语老师是张老师，她和蕦又乐于助人。
checklist: 我能用 What's your favorite...? 询问并回答
我能用 Why...? Because... 说明理由
我能说出并拼写7天的英文名称
我能理解特殊疑问词 What/When/Where/Who/Why/How 的区别
我能写一段话介绍自己喜欢的学科
u09.feynman: 用英语回答——“What is your favorite subject? Why? What day is it?”
review: 🔵 1天后：默写星期1-7和科目名称
🟢 3天后：用 What/Why/When/Who 互相提问
🟡 1周后：写一篇 My Favorite Subject 小短文
🔴 1月后：复习所有特殊疑问词的用法和区别
u09.next_desc: 恭喜你完成了七年级上册所有单元！接下来进入七下——第一单元你将学习用 Can 谈论能力，还会认识各种乐器！

u04.title: Where's my schoolbag?
u04.subtitle: 询问物品位置 · 方位介词 · 房间物品
u04.func: Ask about location · Describe where things are
u04.grammar: Where 问句 · 介词 in/on/under · 用 they 指代复数物品
can_do: I can ask "Where is/are...?" to find things.
I can use in / on / under to describe positions.
I can answer with "It's in/on/under..." or "They're in/on/under..."
I can write about what's in my room.
u04.scene: Tom 早上找不到自己的学习用品，妈妈在帮他找。
dialogue: No, it isn't. Oh, it's on the chair!
Tom, please keep your room tidy!
translation: Tom: 妈妈，我的书包在哪里？
Mom: 它在你的书桌上吗？
Tom: 不，不在。哦，它在椅子上！
Mom: 好的。那你的书在哪里？
Tom: 它们在我的书包里。
Mom: 你的铅笔在哪里？
Tom: 它在桌子下面。
Mom: Tom，请保持你的房间整洁！
key_points: Where is my schoolbag?
用 Where is / Where are 提问位置。单数物品用 is，复数物品用 are。
Is it on your desk?
Yes/No 问句可以把 be 动词提前。Is it on...? 确认某物是否在某处。
It's on the chair. / They're in my schoolbag.
回答时单数用 It is / It's，复数用 They are / They're。
under the desk
under 在……下面；in 在……里面；on 在……上面。
reading_paras: Welcome to my room! It is small but tidy.
My bed is near the window. My schoolbag is on the chair.
My books are in the bookcase. My pencil box is on the desk.
Under the desk, there is a ball. Where is my clock? It's on the wall.
I like my room very much.
vocab: There is a lamp on the desk.
The cat is under the table.
Put the books in the bookcase.
My father is on the sofa.
The keys are in the drawer.
The clock on the wall is new.
patterns: Where is + 单数物品?
询问单个物品的位置。

✅ Where is my pen?
➡ It's on the desk.
✅ Where is the cat?
➡ It's under the table.
Where are + 复数物品?
询问多个物品的位置。

✅ Where are my keys?
➡ They're in the drawer.
✅ Where are your books?
➡ They're on the desk.
Is it / Are they + 位置?
用 Yes/No 问句确认位置。

✅ Is it on your desk? — Yes, it is.
✅ Are they under the chair? — No, they aren't.
➡ 单数用 is it，复数用 are they。
物品 + is/are + 位置.
陈述物品所在位置的基本句型。

✅ My schoolbag is on the chair.
✅ The books are in the bookcase.
✅ The clock is on the wall.
grammar_tables:
📌 句型结构：
Where + is/are + 名词? → 主语 + is/are + 介词短语。
📌 顺口溜：in in 在里面，on on 在上面，under under 在下面，位置表达不会错。
My book is on the desk?
Is my book on the desk?
Where is my pen? It in the pencil box.
Where is my pen? It's in the pencil box.
Where are the keys? It's on the table.
Where are the keys? They're on the table.
3️⃣ 冠词 a / an / the 的基本用法
辅音音素开头的可数名词单数前
a desk, a book, a chair
元音音素开头的可数名词单数前
an eraser, an apple, an hour
双方都知道的/上文提到过的
the desk, the books, the schoolbag

📌 对比：
a book（任意一本书）vs the book（双方都知道的那本）
exercises:
The cat is ____ the table. (in / on / under)
— 猫在桌子下面。
____ are your shoes? — ____ are under the bed.
问复数物品用 Where are；回答用 They are。
补全句子：My books ____ (be) in the ____ (书柜).
books 是复数用 are；书柜是 bookcase。
连词成句：your / schoolbag / where / is / ?
Where 问句：Where + is + 名词?。
改错：The keys is on the desk.
The keys are on the desk.
keys 是复数，be 动词用 are。
汉译英：我的铅笔盒在书包里。
My pencil box is in the schoolbag.
铅笔盒 pencil box；在书包里 in the schoolbag。

补全对话：
A: I can't find my keys. ____ are they?
B: ____ they on the table?
A: No, they ____.
B: Oh, look! ____ are under the sofa.
问 Where are they？确认 Are they...？否定 aren't；回答 They are。
u04.micro_task: 写一段话，描述你的房间或书房。至少写出5件物品的位置，用上 Where is/are、in/on/under。
model_paras: This is my room. It is not big but I like it.
Where is my bed? It's near the window.
My desk is next to the bed. My lamp is on the desk.
My books and notebooks are in the bookcase.
Under my desk, there is a basketball. I love my room!
u04.model_trans: 这是我的房间。它不大，但我很喜欢。我的床在哪里？它在窗户旁边。我的书桌在床边。台灯在书桌上。我的书和笔记本在书柜里。书桌下面有一个篮球。我爱我的房间！
checklist: 我能用 Where is/are 问物品位置并回答
我能正确使用 in/on/under 三个方位介词
我能区分单数回答用 It's，复数回答用 They're
我能理解并运用 a/an/the 的基本区别
我能写一段话介绍我的房间布局
u04.feynman: 闭上眼睛，用英语说出你房间里5件物品的位置——"My phone is on the desk. My shoes are under the chair..."
review: 🔵 1天后：用 Where is/are 向同学提问物品位置
🟢 3天后：画出房间简图并标注英文名称和位置
🟡 1周后：写一篇完整的小短文 My Room
🔴 1月后：复习所有方位介词和 Where 问句
u04.next_title: Do you have a soccer ball?
u04.next_desc: 下一单元你将学习用 Do you have...? 谈论物品所属，运动相关的词汇等你来学！

u03.title: Is this your pencil?
u03.subtitle: 物品所属 · 学校用品 · Yes/No 问句
u03.grammar: Is this/that your ...? · 名词性物主代词 mine/yours/his/hers
can_do: I can ask "Is this/that your ...?" to check ownership.
I can answer "Yes, it is." or "No, it isn't."
I can use mine / yours / his / hers to replace nouns.
I can write a Lost & Found notice.
u03.scene: 教室里，同学们捡到了几样东西，正在互相询问是谁的。
dialogue: Hi! I found a schoolbag. Is this your schoolbag?
No, it isn't. Oh, it's hers. This is Lucy's schoolbag.
Yes, it is. It's mine. Thank you!
No, it isn't. My eraser is mine—it's on my desk.
translation: 老师: 你好！我捡到了一个书包。这是你的书包吗？
Anna: 不，不是。哦，是她的。这是 Lucy 的书包。
老师: Lucy，这是你的书包吗？
Lucy: 是的，是我的。谢谢！
老师: Anna，这是你的橡皮吗？
Anna: 不，不是。我的橡皮在我的书桌上。
老师: 嗯。这是谁的橡皮？
Mike: 是他的。是 Tom 的橡皮。
key_points: Is this your schoolbag?
用 Is this / Is that 确认物品归属。this '这个'（近处），that '那个'（远处）。
Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.
回答时用 it 代替问句中的 this/that。
It's mine / yours / his / hers.
名词性物主代词单独使用，后面不跟名词。mine = my + 名词。
Whose eraser is this?
Whose '谁的' 用于询问物品归属。
reading_paras: Welcome to the school Lost & Found!
Is this your watch? It is black. Please call Mike at 436-5582.
Is that your schoolbag? It is blue and white. Ask the teacher for it.
A set of keys is in the box. Are they yours?
I lost my ID card. I must find it. My phone number is 436-8820.
vocab: 我可以用一下你的橡皮吗？
The ruler is on the desk.
Look it up in the dictionary.
My watch is on the table.
A gold ring is in the box.
patterns: Is this/that + 名词?
确认近处/远处的物品。

✅ Is this your pencil?
➡ Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.
✅ Is that your schoolbag?
It's + 名词性物主代词.
用物主代词避免重复名词。

✅ It's mine. (= my pencil)
✅ It's yours. (= your eraser)
✅ It's his. (= his book)
✅ It's hers. (= her ruler)
Whose + 名词 + is this/that?
询问物品的主人。

✅ Whose pen is this?
➡ It's Tom's.
✅ Whose books are those?
I lost / found + 物品.
失物招领中的常用表达。

✅ I lost my ID card.
✅ I found a watch.
➡ Please call ... at 号码。
grammar_tables: 📌 注意： 回答时用 it 代替 this/that，用 they 代替 these/those。
2️⃣ 形容词性 vs. 名词性物主代词
📌 规律： 名词性物主代词 = 形容词性物主代词 + 名词。his 不变，her → hers，my → mine，your → yours。
This is my book. Is this your book?
This is my book. Is this yours?
It is her pencil. That is his pencil.
It is her pencil. That is his.
It is my book. / It is mine.
3️⃣ 冠词 a / an 的用法（复习）
a pencil, a ruler, a dictionary
an eraser, an ID card, an apple
📌 判断标准： 看发音，不是看字母。an hour (h不发音)，a university (juː 开头)。
exercises: 形容词性物主代词后要有名词；mine 单独使用。
This is ____ (她的) eraser. That is ____ (我的).
物主代词用 your，不是 you。
连词成句：is / notebook / this / your / ?
一般疑问句：Is + this + your + 名词?
用 mine 改写：This is my schoolbag.
汉译英：这些是你的书吗？是的，是我的。
Are these your books? Yes, they are mine.
复数用 Are these；回答用 they are mine。

补全对话：
A: I found a watch. ____ is it?
B: ____ it yours?
A: No, it ____. I think it's ____ (Tom).
Whose 问主人；Is it yours？确认；Tom's 表示所有格。
u03.micro_task: 用 Is this/that...? 和物主代词（mine/yours/his/hers）编写一段4-6轮的对话，情景可以是失物招领处或同学之间互相借/找东西。
checklist: 我能用 Is this/that 问物品归属并回答
我能区分形容词性物主代词和名词性物主代词
我能正确使用 mine/yours/his/hers
我能在语境中使用 Whose 提问
我能写一段失物招领对话
u03.feynman: 假装你捡到一个文具盒，用英语问周围同学是不是他们的。练习 Is this yours? / Yes, it's mine. / No, it isn't. 等表达。
review: 🔵 1天后：用 Is this...? 和 Whose 互相提问教室物品
🟢 3天后：写一段失物招领小对话
🟡 1周后：默写物主代词表格（形容词性 vs. 名词性）
🔴 1月后：复习物主代词和一般疑问句
u03.next_desc: 下一单元你将学习用 Where is/are...? 问物品位置，以及方位介词 in/on/under。
model_paras: Lost:
I lost my student ID card. It is blue and white.
My name is Zhang Wei. Please call me at 139-1234-5678.
Thank you!
u03.model_trans: 我丢失了我的学生证。它是蓝白色的。我的名字是张伟。请致电 139-1234-5678 联系我。谢谢！
